findings.evidence: Roadmap lines 184-191 name Lane F2 and list immediate definitions: almost complex structures, tame/compatible `J`, symplectic manifolds, and `J`-holomorphic maps; changed code lines 193-237 are exactly the `IsComplexLinearMap` closure API used by `JHolomorphic.lean` (`rg` hits include `IsComplexLinearMap.comp` at `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Symplectic/JHolomorphic.lean:226` and `:261`).
findings.fix: Update the PR description to cite `TauCetiRoadmap/HeegaardFloer/README.md`, Lane F2, item 1, as the target/prerequisite being maintained.
findings.issue: The roadmap path is genuine but unstated in the PR description: these `IsComplexLinearMap` closure lemmas support the Heegaard Floer Lane F2 definitions for almost complex structures and `J`-holomorphic maps.

summary: The refactor is a single coherent maintenance change on the almost-complex/J-holomorphic infrastructure, but the PR description does not state the roadmap target it supports.
